tools.name: deploy_landing_zone
tools.description: Deploy AI Landing Zone to Azure — validate Bicep with AVM modules, deploy hub-spoke networking, configure private endpoints, set up RBAC, enable monitoring. Use when: deploy, provision, Bicep, infrastructure, landing zone, networking.

tools.name: evaluate_landing_zone
tools.description: Evaluate AI Landing Zone security and compliance — audit private endpoints, NSG rules, RBAC assignments, diagnostic settings, encryption, network isolation. Use when: evaluate, audit, security, compliance, review, assess.

tools.name: tune_landing_zone
tools.description: Tune AI Landing Zone for production — optimize SKU sizing, reduce cost, configure monitoring thresholds, right-size networking, manage GPU quota. Use when: tune, optimize, cost, SKU, quota, performance, budget.
